basic_details.job_title: CAEPHT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Field cum Laboratory Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: College of Agricultural Engineering & Post Harvest Technology (CAEPHT)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Field cum Laboratory Assistant
basic_details.short_information: College of Agricultural Engineering & Post Harvest Technology (CAEPHT) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Field cum Laboratory Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 25 April 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CAEPHT Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Field cum Laboratory Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/M.E. in Food Process Engineering or related fields with NET, Graduation with knowledge of English, Nepali and Hindi
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.Tech./M.E. in Food Process Engineering/ Agricultural Processing/Processing and Food Engineering/Dairy and Food Engineering/Dairy & Food Technology or any other relevant specialization related to Food Engineering and Food Technology or M. Sc. in relevant subjects/Livestock Product Technology or any relevant specialization with NET qualifications. Desirable: Preference will be given to the candidate having the experience of processing, product development and analysis of dairy and food products, knowledge of creation and analysis of 3D drawings and machine design. Field cum Laboratory Assistant: Graduation with knowledge of English, Nepali and Hindi.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): ₹ 37,000/- per month plus HRA as applicable (₹ 42,000/- per month plus HRA after satisfactory performance of 2 years) Field cum Laboratory Assistant: ₹ 15,000/- per month fixed

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CAEPHT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CAEPHT recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CAEPHT recruitment is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the CAEPHT recruitment?
faq.answer: CAEPHT is recruiting for two posts: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Field cum Laboratory Assistant. There is one vacancy for each post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need an M.Tech./M.E. in Food Process Engineering or related fields with NET qualification, or an M.Sc. in relevant subjects with NET. Experience in food product development is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the CAEPHT recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by CAEPHT is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Field cum Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Field cum Laboratory Assistant will receive a fixed monthly salary of ₹15,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the CAEPHT recruitment involves a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CAEPHT recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by CAEPHT.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for CAEPHT jobs?
faq.answer: The application for these positions at CAEPHT must be submitted via Email. Ensure all required documents are attached and the email is sent before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the College of Agricultural Engineering & Post Harvest Technology (CAEPHT) located in Gangtok, Sikkim.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of CAEPHT?
faq.answer: The official website of the College of Agricultural Engineering & Post Harvest Technology (CAEPHT) is www.cau.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information.
